properties.description: Dataflow to convert P6 Engineering histogram data with unpivot per date

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Contract as string,
		Phase as string,
		PSRL1Code as string,
		PSRL2Code as string,
		Office as string,
		TYPE as string,
		Prime as string,
		{Sub Prime} as string,
		SFN as string,
		{Activity Code} as string,
		Discipline as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true) ~> SrcP6EngrManHrsHisto
FltIncorrectActivity derive(Contract = iif(length(trim(Contract))>5,concat('99',trim(Contract)),trim(Contract)),
		Office = trim(Office),
		each(match(in(['TYPE','Prime','Sub Prime','SFN','Activity Code','Discipline','Phase','PSRL1Code','PSRL2Code'],name)), $$ = trim($$))) ~> dcGetProject
dcGetProject unpivot(output(
		Period as string,
		Units as string
	),
	ungroupBy(Contract,
		Phase,
		Office,
		TYPE,
		Prime,
		{Sub Prime},
		SFN,
		{Activity Code},
		Discipline,
		PSRL1Code,
		PSRL2Code),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> UnpivotData
UnpivotData filter(Units != '-') ~> FltDummyRows
SrcP6EngrManHrsHisto filter(!(isNull(Contract))) ~> FltIncorrectActivity
FltDummyRows sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['p6_engr_histo.csv'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		Contract,
		Phase,
		Office,
		TYPE,
		Prime,
		{Sub Prime},
		SFN,
		{Activity Code},
		Discipline,
		PSRL1Code,
		PSRL2Code,
		Period,
		Units
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> SnkP6EngrManHrs
